version_date: June 2009 (revised June 2009; earlier revisions May 1998 and September 2003)
scope_summary: WAPC policy dealing with the classes of strata title proposals that require WAPC approval (certificate of approval under s25 Strata Titles Act 1985, and survey strata under Part 10 of the Planning and Development Act 2005), and the criteria for determining them. It covers general requirements, approval procedures, vacant strata and survey strata lots (residential and non-residential), strata titled caravan parks, strata titles in rural areas, and appeal/reconsideration mechanisms, including the June 2009 delegation of built strata approvals to local governments.

key_numeric_standards.topic: exemption from WAPC approval - maximum dwelling units
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: strata subdivision of residential developments under regulation 15 of the Strata Titles General Regulations 1996 (each strata lot containing one existing dwelling)

key_numeric_standards.topic: exemption from WAPC approval - maximum land parcel area
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: land parcel subject to built strata application (delegation/exemption criteria)

key_numeric_standards.topic: small survey strata lot information threshold
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: survey strata lots below this area - WAPC may require details of existing/proposed buildings, fences, driveways to assess against DC 2.2

key_numeric_standards.unit: % (maximum, of the total 10% public open space provision)
key_numeric_standards.applies_to: survey strata subdivision - communal open space usable and developed for general recreation
allocation of a site for community facilities credited toward communal open space
survey strata driveways up to six dwellings designed per R-Codes; access ways in excess of six dwellings per DC 2.6
WAPC/local government determination of built strata certificate of approval applications
determination of vacant lot strata applications
application for review under s27 Strata Titles Act of a WAPC strata decision
SAT review under s251 P&D Act, and WAPC reconsideration requests

definitions: survey strata lots (cl 1.3: lots consisting of surveyed land boundaries, buildings not part of the scheme)
built strata (cl 1.4, delegation to local government)

cross_references.cited: State Planning Policy 3.1 Residential Design Codes (Variation 1) (R-Codes)
Development Control Policy 2.3 Public Open Space in Residential Areas
Development Control Policy 2.6 Residential Road Planning
Development Control Policy 3.4 Subdivision of Rural Land
Guidelines for the Design and Geometric Layout of Residential Roads
Planning Bulletin 14 Amendments to Strata Titles Act May 1996
Planning Bulletin 19 Strata Titles Amendment Act 1996 - Update on Policy and Practice February 1997

quality_flags: two-column layout interleaving: clause text from adjacent columns merged on the same lines in places (e.g. cl 1.1-1.5 block), text recoverable

policy predates the Strata Titles Amendment Act 2018 / Strata Titles (General) Regulations 2019 - statutory references (Strata Titles General Regulations 1996, s25 certificate of approval regime) are dated even though the policy remains the current published version
